final:
// // This module handles the execution of NOP instructions. When flush is high, it outputs a predefined NOP opcode (16'b0000000000000000). Otherwise, it passes through the instruction data.
module top_module(
	input [15:0] inst_in,
	input flush,
	output reg [15:0] inst_out);always @* begin
	
		if (flush == 1'b1) begin
			inst_out <= 16'b1000100000000000; 
		end else begin
			inst_out <= inst_in;
		end
	
	end
	
endmodule
